name: b200_multibox
_comment: NVIDIA HGX/DGX Blackwell B200 multi-box deployment template (8-GPU NVLink5 islands stitched by ConnectX-8 XDR InfiniBand at ~2.5 us/100 GB/s). num_devices and ib.ports are auto-overridden by `system_with_eta(..., num_devices=N)` to match the declared cluster size; the JSON's defaults (16 GPUs, 2 boxes) are nominal placeholders. Intra-box: NVLink5 1.8 TB/s bidir (900 GB/s single-direction) per GPU through 4 NVSwitch5 chips. Inter-box: ConnectX-8 XDR (800 Gbps = 100 GB/s single-direction per GPU). A collective <=8 ranks stays on nvlink5; collectives spanning multiple boxes escalate to ib (paying alpha = 0.5 + 2.5 = 3.0 us, BW-floored to 100 GB/s).
